description: Style Note Accessorise your outfit with fabulous bangles from adrika. It will grab attention with its subtle beauty and exquisite designs. Wear it for that special day and get the mood just right with this piece! Product Details Yellow beaded bangle that has an interlooped design with an opening that can be stretched to slide the hand through Material and CareGlass and poth beads Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Diameter: 4 cm
